root_cause: SVG files had permissions 600 (rw-------) — web server process could not read them. Fixed to 644.

changes.details: Changed from 600 to 644. Enhanced SVG: folded-metal origami V effect with 3 faces per arm, radial background glow, center crease highlight, indigo left/violet-pink right. viewBox 100x100 for better detail.
Changed from 600 to 644. Light theme variant updated to match new design.

topbar_check: TopBar.tsx uses with logoSrc='/logo-mark.svg' — correct for Next.js public dir. No changes needed.

design.left_arm: indigo #6366f1 with dark inner face + lighter outer highlight
